title: feat: move gemini-2.5-flash-lite to netsim GCP account
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Splitting the Gemini streams
gist.blurb: We've rewired our backend to route Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite and Gemini Search through a dedicated Google Cloud account. Smoother sailing for our text generation infrastructure!
gist.summary: Refactored Google Cloud authentication to support multiple GCP accounts and routed specific Gemini models to a dedicated project.
gist.impact: This internal infrastructure update improves load distribution for Gemini models without changing the user-facing API.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee (Polly) acting as a traffic controller or train conductor, routing glowing data streams (representing Gemini models) into two different glowing pipes or pathways. The robot companion is helping hold a map or clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny train conductor hat, routing glowing blue data streams into two different chunky retro pipes while a CRT-monitor robot holds a clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background with warm lighting and lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny train conductor hat, routing glowing blue data streams into two different chunky retro pipes while a CRT-monitor robot holds a clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background with warm lighting and lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
